alternative_parents.description: Compounds in which a hydroxy group, -OH, is attached to a saturated carbon atom R3COH (R not H ).
alternative_parents.name: Tertiary alcohols

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing the phosphite oxoanion, with the formula  [PO3]3-.
alternative_parents.name: Organic phosphites

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing the dialkyl ether functional group, with the formula ROR', where R and R' are alkyl groups.
alternative_parents.name: Dialkyl ethers

alternative_parents.description: Compounds comprising the primary alcohol functional group, with the general structure RCOH (R=alkyl, aryl).
alternative_parents.name: Primary alcohols

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

class.description: Organic compounds containing a phosphorous acid, which is tri-esterified with alkyl groups.
class.name: Trialkylphosphites

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as trialkylphosphites. These are organic compounds containing a phosphorous acid, which is tri-esterified with alkyl groups.

direct_parent.description: Organic compounds containing a phosphorous acid, which is tri-esterified with alkyl groups.
direct_parent.name: Trialkylphosphites

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

superclass.description: Organic compounds containing the phosphorus atom.
superclass.name: Organophosphorus compounds
